about.description1: I’m a passionate frontend developer who enjoys building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications. Programming inspires me because it allows me to turn ideas into real digital experiences while continuously learning new technologies.
about.description2: I improve my coding skills through personal projects, practice, and curiosity about modern frontend development. I enjoy solving problems with analytical thinking, creativity, and persistence, always searching for clean and efficient solutions. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn, grow, and become a better developer.

projects.title: My Works
projects.description: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

projectsDes.joinDescription: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
projectsDes.polloDescription: A small jump-and-run game with object-oriented JavaScript. Fight enemies, collect coins and bottles, and defeat the boss.
projectsDes.bubbleDescription: A chat application for team communication with channels, direct messages, and a clean responsive interface.
projectsDes.pokedexDescription: A Pokédex app that loads Pokémon data from an API and displays details like type, stats, and evolution.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a problem to solve?
contact.text: I am a Frontend Developer focused on clean code and modern design. I am looking for opportunities to contribute and grow — feel free to contact me.

contactPrivacy.privacyEnd: and agree to the processing of my data.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.name: Eid Aden Abdi

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The protection of your personal data is very important to me. I process your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the legal data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
privacy.name: Eid Aden
privacy.contactFormText1: If you send me inquiries via the contact form, your details from the form, including the contact information you provide there, will be stored for the purpose of processing the request and in case of follow-up questions.
privacy.contactFormText2: The processing of this data is carried out on the basis of Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR or on the basis of your consent according to Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. a GDPR.
privacy.emailRequestText: If you contact me by email, your request including all resulting personal data will be stored for processing purposes.
privacy.hostingText1: This website is hosted by the following provider:
privacy.hostingText2: The use is based on the interest of a secure and reliable provision of this website according to Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR.
privacy.logFilesText: The website provider automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits. These are:
privacy.logFilesEnd: This data is not merged with other data sources.
privacy.cookiesText: This website does not use cookies or tracking tools.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right at any time to:
privacy.rightDelete: Correction or deletion of your data
privacy.storageText: Your personal data will remain with me until the purpose of the data processing no longer applies or you request deletion, provided that there are no legal retention obligations.
privacy.decisionText: No automated decision-making or profiling takes place.
